Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. As Plaintiff And Real Party In Interest For Metropolitan Electrical Construction, Inc..; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Elmira Howard
Off Calendar Dec-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

OTHER ARTHUR J. GALLAGHER & CO., AN ILLINOIS CORPORATION'S Motion To Substitute Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. As Plaintiff And Real Party In Interest For Metropolitan Electrical Construction, Inc. is Granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
